product_description: Offline coaching for CBSE Classes 9-12 — Maths, Physics, Chemistry. Small batches of max 15 students. Run by a single teacher (Mr. Sharma, 14 years experience, ex-FIITJEE). Operating from a 2-room setup in Sector 62, Noida. Monthly fee: ₹3,500 per subject, ₹8,000 for all three.
target_audience: Parents of Class 9-12 CBSE students in Noida Sector 50-70 who want focused teaching instead of large coaching factories. Household income ₹10-25 lakh/year. They value small batch size, teacher attention, and proven board results over brand names.
unique_selling_points: Max 15 students per batch — every student gets personal attention
100% of last year's batch scored above 85% in boards
Doubt-clearing over WhatsApp even after class hours
